title: apium nodiflorum var. intermedium
intro: Apium nodiflorum var. intermedium, also known as intermediate or wild celery, is a variant of the Apium nodiflorum plant, a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the carrot family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Apium nodiflorum var. intermedium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
